zh.Bridstow, Herefordshire Unitary Authorit: 英國英格蘭賀福爾布利德斯托福
zh.Worcester, City of Worcester, Worcesters: 英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾伍斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當John James Higgins於1503年3月10日出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾布利德斯托福時，他的父親Charles Fortescue Higgins20歲，母親Ann Hamilton23歲。他於1527年與Elizabeth Charlotte Neives在英國英格蘭賀福爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1548年在他的家鄉享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾伍斯特。

zh-hans.Bridstow, Herefordshire Unitary Authorit: 英国英格兰賀福爾布利德斯托福

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John James Higgins于1503年3月10日出生在英国英格兰賀福爾布利德斯托福时，他的父亲Charles Fortescue Higgins20岁，母亲Ann Hamilton23岁。他于1527年与Elizabeth Charlotte Neives在英国英格兰賀福爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1548年在他的家乡享年45岁，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾伍斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Higgins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hUiginn ‘descendant of Uiginn’, a byname meaning ‘viking, sea-rover’ (from Old Norse víkingr). Compare McGuigan .

English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Higgin, itself either a Lancashire variant of Huggin (from a pet form of Hugh ), or a variant of Hickin (from a pet form of Richard ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. See Hick and compare Higson .

variants.name: McGuigan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Mairead.
Irish (northern): perhaps an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Uiginn ‘son of the viking’ (see Higgins 1).
Irish (northern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Guagáin, a shortened form of Mag Eochagáin, son of Eochagán, a diminutive of Eochaidh ‘horseman’. Compare Geoghegan .

variants.name: Kiggins
meanings: Irish (Galway and Mayo) and Manx: shortened Anglicized form (with English excrescent -s) of Gaelic Mag Uiginn ‘son of the Viking’ (see Higgins ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When John James Higgins was born on 10 March 1503, in Bridstow, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Charles Fortescue Higgins, was 20 and his mother, Ann Hamilton, was 23. He married Elizabeth Charlotte Neives in 1527, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1548, in his hometown, at the age of 45, and was buried in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John James Higgins est né le 10 mars 1503, à Bridstow, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Charles Fortescue Higgins, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Ann Hamilton, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Charlotte Neives en 1527, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1548, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John James Higgins am 10. März 1503 in Bridstow, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Charles Fortescue Higgins 20 und seine Mutter Ann Hamilton 23. Er hat 1527 in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Charlotte Neives geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1548 im Alter von 45 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John James Higgins è nato il il 10 marzo 1503 nel Bridstow, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Charles Fortescue Higgins, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Ann Hamilton, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Charlotte Neives nel 1527, nel Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1548, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Worcester, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John James Higginsが1503年3月10日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブリドストウで生まれた時，父Charles Fortescue Higginsは20歳，母Ann Hamiltonは23歳であった。1527年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでElizabeth Charlotte Neivesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1548年に故郷で45歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John James Higgins(이)가 1503년 3월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 브리드스타우에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Charles Fortescue Higgins(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Hamilton(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1527년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 Elizabeth Charlotte Neives(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1548년 그의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 워스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John James Higgins nasceu em 10 de março de 1503, em Bridstow, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Charles Fortescue Higgins, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Ann Hamilton, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Charlotte Neives em 1527, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1548, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John James Higgins родился 10 марта 1503 г. в местности бридстоу, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Charles Fortescue Higgins было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Hamilton, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Charlotte Neives в 1527 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1548 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John James Higgins nació el 10 de marzo de 1503, en Bridstow, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Charles Fortescue Higgins, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Ann Hamilton, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Charlotte Neives en 1527, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1548, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
